nasb.text: All the people went up after him, and the people were playing on flutes and rejoicing with great joy, so that the earth shook at their noise.

esv.text: And all the people went up after him, playing on pipes, and rejoicing with great joy, so that the earth was split by their noise.

cnv.text: 眾民都跟隨他上去，吹著笛子，十分歡樂，以致大地也因他們的聲音震裂。

ccb.text: 众人浩浩荡荡地随着所罗门回京，一路上吹笛欢呼，声音震动大地。
